visits.note: Patient presents with symptoms of fatigue, polyuria, and polydipsia. BP 140/90, HbA1c 7.5. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension. Medications: Metformin 500mg, Lisinopril 2.5mg. Symptoms: fatigue, polyuria, polydipsia.

Patient reports worsening fatigue and shortness of breath. BP 150/95, HbA1c 8.1. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia. Medications: Metformin 1000mg, Lisinopril 5mg, Atorvastatin 20mg. Symptoms: fatigue, shortness of breath, polyuria, polydipsia.

Patient's HbA1c improves with diet and exercise. BP 130/80, HbA1c 6.8. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia. Medications: Metformin 500mg, Lisinopril 2.5mg, Atorvastatin 10mg. Symptoms: fatigue, polyuria, polydipsia.

Patient experiences acute kidney injury and develops edema. BP 160/100, HbA1c 7.3. Diagnoses: Type 2 Diabetes, Hypertension, Hyperlipidemia, Chronic Kidney Disease. Medications: Metformin 1000mg, Lisinopril 10mg, Atorvastatin 20mg, Furosemide 40mg. Symptoms: fatigue, shortness of breath, polyuria, polydipsia, edema.
